## What we do

![Car](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bkzketoq/production/07525e5f6eab65ee5f97ca4f23acb0e8787ea371-4000x6000.jpg)

##### Welcome to Penny Car Hire

We hire and lease vehicles on short and long term agreements. We take pride in our meticulously maintained fleet of vehicles, ensuring a seamless rental experience and providing customer service that has clients from all over the world returning time and again.

##### Our commitment to quality

We have been proudly serving Virginia Water and the surrounding areas since 1976 and from our current location in Virginia Water train station since 2006. Getting to us could not be easier, we are a stone's throw from the ticket barriers at the station or a short local taxi journey from Heathrow airport.

![Car](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bkzketoq/production/8a39f5f98cbcef6f3207fb7e7748523bf8fc47a5-3406x5109.jpg)

![Car keys](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bkzketoq/production/4a47bc0f11721b2faf3d1eb42118d75bbc7dbe0c-4000x6000.jpg)

##### Our user-friendly approach

Use our easy online booking request feature, or give us a call and one of our friendly team will be more than happy to help. If you are calling from abroad, Whatsapp calling works on our same number.

[Review us on\\
\\
![Trustpilot](https://www.pennycarhire.co.uk/images/trustpilot/Trustpilot_logo.png)](https://uk.trustpilot.com/review/pennycarhire.co.uk?utm_medium=trustbox&utm_source=TrustBoxReviewCollector)

![Google reviews](https://www.pennycarhire.co.uk/images/google/google-reviews-logo.png)Click to see our reviews!

# All vehicles ULEZ compliant

All of our cars & vans meet the latest ULEZ regulations. So if you are planning on driving into the Ultra Low Emission Zone there is no charge.

# Breakdown cover included

Have the peace of mind that all of our vehicles have 24/7 breakdown cover, so no matter what the roads throw at you, you are always covered!

# Insurance included

Drive away with the comfort that all quoted prices include insurance for one driver, so should anything happen during your hire you are covered.

Who we are:

- **Penny Car Hire**, The Station,Virginia Water, Surrey, GU25 4AA

Opening times:

- Monday to Friday: 8am - 6pm
- Saturday: 9am - 6pm
- Sunday: Closed

Contact us:

- Telephone: **[+44 1344 843050](tel:+44 1344 843050)**
- Email: **[bookings@pennycarhire.co.uk](mailto:bookings@pennycarhire.co.uk)**
